name: Pear Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chopped fresh oregano or 1 tsp Dried oregano
1 tbsp Chopped fresh basil or 1 tsp Dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium frying pan.
2. Saute onion until tender, about 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Add green pepper, garlic, parsley, lemon juice, salt, oregano, basil, and Tabasco sauce; cook for 2 minutes.
4. Remove the frying pan from heat and stir in tomatoes and pears.
5. Cover and refrigerate. Makes 5 cups.
